data.name: id
data.description: Do not extract anything for this, but have the field in json

data.name: before_g3_goal
data.description: The handwritten response to the Goal on page 1.

data.name: before_g3_input
data.description: The handwritten response to the input on page 1 answers the question of describing each input parameter.

data.name: before_g3_output
data.description: The handwritten response to the output on page 1.

data.name: before_g3_invariants
data.description: The invariants of the system that must always hold on page 3. Extract the list of up to 3 handwritten responses.

data.name: before_g3_constraints
data.description: The constraints and assumptions of the system before the requirement change on page 2. Extract a list of up to 6  handwritten responses.

data.name: before_g3_p_1
data.description: Extract the selected option to question 1 on page 5, titled prediction sheet.  The option is one of the ones in the possible values and has a mark next to it in the document.

data.name: before_g3_p_2
data.description: Extract the selected option to question 2 on page 5, titled prediction sheet.  The option is one of the ones in the possible values and has a mark next to it in the document.

data.name: before_g3_p_3
data.description: Extract the selected option to question 3 on page 5, titled prediction sheet.  The option is one of the ones in the possible values and has a mark next to it in the document.

data.name: before_g3_p_4
data.description: prediction question 4 before the requirement change on page 5. Extract the number written in empty space.

data.name: before_g3_p_5
data.description: Extract the selected option to question 5 on page 5, titled prediction sheet.  The option is one or more of the ones in the possible values and has a mark next to it in the document.

data.name: before_g3_p_6
data.description: Extract the selected option to question 6 on page 6.  The option has a mark next to it in the document.

data.name: before_g3_p_7
data.description: Extract the selected option to question 7 on page 6. The option has a mark next to it in the document.

data.name: before_g3_p_8
data.description: Extract the selected option to question 8 on page 6. The option has a mark next to it in the document.

data.name: before_g3_frs
data.description: Extract a list of handwritten functional requirements on page 2.  Extract a list of up to 10 handwritten responses.

data.name: before_g3_neg_req
data.description: The negative requirements of the system are on page 3. Extract a list of up to 2  handwritten responses.

data.name: before_g3_tie_breaking
data.description: The handwritten response to the tie-breaking rule on page 3.

data.name: before_g3_exception
data.description: The handwritten response to the Exception and Day-specific Rules on page 4.
